strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js, directly aligning with the primary stack requirements
Demonstrated ability to design and maintain scalable, real-time systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq), showcasing adaptability to emerging technologies
concerns: Limited direct Kotlin/Java experience, though prior Java exposure exists; secondary stack familiarity may require ramp-up
Recent employment at re:cinq (April 2025–present) may not reflect long-term stability for this role
While GitLab and CI/CD are familiar, explicit Kubernetes experience is not highlighted in the resume
response.justification: Bogdan’s resume demonstrates deep full-stack proficiency in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js), complemented by scalable system design experience (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby) and cutting-edge AI-agent infrastructure work (re:cinq). His history of rapid learning across languages and domains (e.g., D, Java, C++) underscores adaptability, while his focus on testability, user experience, and collaboration aligns closely with the role’s emphasis on clean, well-documented code and cross-team communication.
